title: Fix the Simple Array Duplicate Finder

statement.markdown: Write a function that takes an array of integers as input and returns the count of each integer that appears more than once. The output should be an object where keys are the duplicate integers and values are their respective counts.
statement.inputFormat: An array of integers where each integer is between 1 and 10000.
statement.outputFormat: An object where keys are the duplicate integers and values are their respective counts.
statement.notes: The function should return an empty object if there are no duplicate integers.

examples.explanation: The function should return an object with keys 2 and 4 and values 2 and 2 respectively.
The function should return an empty object as there are no duplicate integers.

hints.text: Use the Map data structure to count the occurrences of each integer.
